sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong tung ding leitung hin bei ni,
Tu’n ka theih bang la sa lo ding;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gupna thu itna tawh hong gen;
Ka mu ding hi, Topa maitang,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung ka inn puk ni om,
Cik ciang ding hiam gen thei lo hi;
Vantung ka om na’ng ka thei zo.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni tum khua vangtang lim nuaiah;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ni khat ni ding vil in ngak in,
Hong Honpa’n kong hong hon ciangin,
Ama kiang zuan in lengto ning.
